events.title: A controlled practice session
events.text: You trace a small circle of light and practise holding it steady.

choices.label: Focus on control
choices.outcome: The light stays calm and your magical control improves.

choices.label: Push for more power
choices.outcome: The spell flares brightly before fading, leaving you exhilarated.

events.title: A clue in an old text
events.text: A strange passage suggests that magic can be awakened through study, mentorship, inheritance, or a moment of crisis.

choices.label: Take careful notes
choices.outcome: You copy the clues and begin noticing patterns you had missed.

choices.label: Close the book for now
choices.outcome: You decide not to rush into something you do not yet understand.

events.title: A routine appointment
events.text: A doctor asks about your health, sleep, and any concerns you have noticed.

choices.label: Describe everything honestly
choices.outcome: The appointment gives you a clearer plan for looking after yourself.

choices.label: Keep the visit brief
choices.outcome: You complete the basic check and leave with simple advice.

events.title: A public appearance
events.text: You have a chance to shape how people see you.

choices.label: Be thoughtful and sincere
choices.outcome: People respond well to your calm and genuine appearance.

choices.label: Make a bold impression
choices.outcome: The appearance gets attention, though not everyone agrees about it.

events.title: Sparks at the wrong moment
events.text: A small burst of magic escapes when you are startled in public.

choices.label: Pretend it was a trick
choices.outcome: Most people accept the explanation, though one person looks unconvinced.

choices.label: Tell someone you trust
choices.outcome: Sharing the truth makes the secret feel lighter.

events.title: A possible familiar
events.text: A clever animal begins appearing whenever you practise magic.

choices.label: Welcome it
choices.outcome: The animal settles nearby and seems to understand far more than it should.

choices.label: Observe from a distance
choices.outcome: You study its behaviour without deciding what the connection means.

events.title: A family secret about magic
events.text: A relative admits that unusual abilities have appeared in the family before.

choices.label: Ask them everything
choices.outcome: The conversation explains why magic always felt strangely familiar.

choices.label: Give them time
choices.outcome: You let the secret settle and promise to talk again later.

events.title: The library behind a dream
events.text: You dream of shelves containing books that do not exist anywhere else.

choices.label: Open one of the books
choices.outcome: You wake remembering a fragment of a spell and a feeling of vast possibility.

choices.label: Leave the library alone
choices.outcome: You wake rested, with the sense that the door will return when needed.

events.title: A tempting shortcut
events.text: Magic offers an easy solution to a problem that would normally require patience.

choices.label: Solve it without magic
choices.outcome: The slower solution strengthens your trust in your own judgement.

choices.label: Use a small spell
choices.outcome: The problem disappears quickly, but you wonder whether the shortcut was wise.

events.title: Magic could help in an emergency
events.text: A sudden accident unfolds nearby, and a discreet spell might help without revealing too much.

choices.label: Use magic to help
choices.outcome: Your quick spell prevents the situation from becoming worse, and no one is certain what happened.

choices.label: Call for ordinary help
choices.outcome: You make sure trained help arrives and keep your magic hidden.
